description.en: The world's longest venomous snake, capable of standing up tall and expanding a terrifying hood.
description.zh: 世界上最长的毒蛇，能够高高竖起身体并展开令人恐惧的颈部皮褶。

anatomy.en: The king cobra is the longest venomous snake on Earth, capable of growing up to 18 feet (5.5 meters) long! When it feels angry or threatened, it can lift a third of its body off the ground—looking a grown person right in the eye—and flatten its neck to create a scary, spoon-shaped 'hood'.
anatomy.zh: 眼镜王蛇是地球上最长的毒蛇，体长可达18英尺（5.5米）！当它感到愤怒或受到威胁时，它可以把三分之一的身体抬离地面——足以直视一个成年人的眼睛——并压平脖子，形成一个可怕的汤匙状‘皮褶’。

ecology_and_behavior.en: Their scientific name, Ophiophagus, literally means 'snake-eater'. That's right—king cobras mostly hunt and eat other snakes, including deadly pythons! They have enough venom in a single bite to take down a massive Asian elephant. Surprisingly, king cobra moms are the only snakes in the world that build a nest of leaves to guard their eggs.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 它们的学名Ophiophagus字面意思是“吃蛇者”。没错——眼镜王蛇主要捕猎和吃其他蛇类，包括致命的蟒蛇！它们咬一口的毒液量足以放倒一头巨大的亚洲象。令人惊讶的是，眼镜王蛇妈妈是世界上唯一会用树叶筑巢并守护蛇蛋的蛇。

habitat_and_distribution.en: King cobras slither through the dense rainforests, bamboo thickets, and mangrove swamps of India and Southeast Asia. They prefer living near streams and are excellent swimmers and tree climbers.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 眼镜王蛇在印度和东南亚茂密的热带雨林、竹林和红树林沼泽中滑行。它们喜欢住在溪流附近，是极好的游泳健将和爬树高手。

habitat.text_en: Rainforests and bamboo thickets of South and Southeast Asia
habitat.text_zh: 南亚和东南亚的热带雨林及竹林
